title: Copper Golem Plus
description: Copper Golem compatibility for all storage mods!
body:
(Forge port are expected to come in v2.1)
# Make Copper Golem more customizable!
You can now make Copper Golem work with any containers like barrels and shulker boxes and even modded ones too (all Reinforced Chests / Barrels / Shulker Boxes are supported)


Configuration Menu:
![Configuration Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708a13f326cf065c0f24e815406188a54d6a306e_0.webp)

Copper Golem using Diamond Chest as a destination storage:
![Copper Golem using Diamond Chest as a destination](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/245182154a400d0d7c89fa020af0783cfdbf0a29.gif)

Copper Golem using Iron Chest as a source storage:
![Ironic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bbd1be501b3ec7aee0b5c19c904d763b42444ad.gif)
